title: David Jeremiah
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|David}}
{{Image|person}}
'''David Jeremiah''' provided voices for several ''Star Wars'' video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''—Commander [[Kupalo]], Civilian Officer 3, Civilian Pilot 3
*[[Star Wars: Episode I Racer|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''Racer'']]—[[Dud Bolt/Legends|Dud Bolt]], [[Navior|"Bullseye" Navior]]
*[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]]''—Informant, [[Kreg]], Naboo Soldier #1, Tatooine Citizen, Techie
*''[[Star Wars: Episode I Jedi Power Battles]]''—[[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]], Pedestrian Male
*''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''—Capt. [[Marsune (Gungan)|Marsune]], Rebel missile trooper, Trade Federation hovercraft captain
*''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]''—Dud Bolt, [[Occo Ninebar]]
